queries.question: For every tester, list information about test cases they use (their types and descriptions).
queries.sql: select quality_assurance_testers.fullname , test_cases.casetype , test_cases.description from Qualified_Tests join Test_Cases on Qualified_Tests.testCaseID = Test_Cases.testCaseID join Quality_Assurance_Testers on Qualified_Tests.testerID = Quality_Assurance_Testers.testerID
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?fullname ?casetype ?description WHERE {
  ?qualified_tests a :Qualified_Tests .
  ?test_cases a :Test_Cases .
  ?qualified_tests p:hasTest_Cases ?test_cases .
  ?quality_assurance_testers a :Quality_Assurance_Testers .
  ?qualified_tests p:hasQuality_Assurance_Testers ?quality_assurance_testers .
  ?quality_assurance_testers p:name ?fullname .
  ?test_cases p:caseType ?casetype .
  ?test_cases p:description ?description .
}

queries.question: For every quality assurance tester, list descriptions of test cases they use.
queries.sql: select quality_assurance_testers.fullname , test_cases.description from Qualified_Tests join Test_Cases on Qualified_Tests.testCaseID = Test_Cases.testCaseID join Quality_Assurance_Testers on Qualified_Tests.testerID = Quality_Assurance_Testers.testerID
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?fullname ?description WHERE {
  ?qualified_tests a :Qualified_Tests .
  ?test_cases a :Test_Cases .
  ?qualified_tests p:hasTest_Cases ?test_cases .
  ?quality_assurance_testers a :Quality_Assurance_Testers .
  ?qualified_tests p:hasQuality_Assurance_Testers ?quality_assurance_testers .
  ?quality_assurance_testers p:name ?fullname .

}

queries.question: Can you list the quality assurance testers and the corresponding test case types.
queries.sql: select quality_assurance_testers.fullname , test_cases.casetype from Qualified_Tests join Test_Cases on Qualified_Tests.testCaseID = Test_Cases.testCaseID join Quality_Assurance_Testers on Qualified_Tests.testerID = Quality_Assurance_Testers.testerID
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?fullname ?casetype WHERE {
  ?qualified_tests a :Qualified_Tests .
  ?test_cases a :Test_Cases .
  ?qualified_tests p:hasTest_Cases ?test_cases .
  ?quality_assurance_testers a :Quality_Assurance_Testers .
  ?qualified_tests p:hasQuality_Assurance_Testers ?quality_assurance_testers .
  ?quality_assurance_testers p:name ?fullname .
  ?test_cases p:caseType ?casetype .
}

queries.question: Tell me about the different types of test cases, including their descriptions, that each tester uses.
queries.sql: SELECT Test_Cases.caseType, Test_Cases.description  from Qualified_Tests join Test_Cases on Qualified_Tests.testCaseID = Test_Cases.testCaseID join Quality_Assurance_Testers on Qualified_Tests.testerID = Quality_Assurance_Testers.testerID   GROUP BY Qualified_Tests.testCaseID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Qualified_Tests.testerID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Quality_Assurance_Testers)

queries.question: Can you list the test case types each quality assurance tester is qualified for?
queries.sql: SELECT Test_Cases.caseType  from Qualified_Tests join Test_Cases on Qualified_Tests.testCaseID = Test_Cases.testCaseID join Quality_Assurance_Testers on Qualified_Tests.testerID = Quality_Assurance_Testers.testerID   GROUP BY Qualified_Tests.testCaseID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Qualified_Tests.testerID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Quality_Assurance_Testers)

queries.question: What are the descriptions of test cases that are common to all quality assurance testers?
queries.sql: SELECT Test_Cases.description  from Qualified_Tests join Test_Cases on Qualified_Tests.testCaseID = Test_Cases.testCaseID join Quality_Assurance_Testers on Qualified_Tests.testerID = Quality_Assurance_Testers.testerID   GROUP BY Qualified_Tests.testCaseID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Qualified_Tests.testerID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Quality_Assurance_Testers)

ambiguous_dsl.question: Tell me about the different types of test cases, including their descriptions, that each tester uses.
Describe the test cases each quality assurance tester uses.
Can you list the test case types each quality assurance tester is qualified for?
